positive: Minimalist, whimsical scene featuring a detailed bioluminescent forest canopy above a calm river at twilight. The primary subjects are stylized, glowing flora and diverse woodland animals (e.g., fox, deer, owl, bunny) rendered in a clean, silhouette style with vibrant electric blue, soft emerald green, and warm gold accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a circular apparel print. Use clean lines, strong contrast against a deep indigo sky/water background, and a slight graphic novel aesthetic. Trending on ArtStation, ultra high detail, vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, out of focus, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, multiple hands, extra limbs, poorly drawn anatomy, messy, amateur, lowres
